LightningComponentBundle.masterLabel: REDU Continuing Edu - Offering Record Details Card

property.name: title
property.label: Title
property.description: Enter a value to display as Title to define course related information e.g. Registration details, registration detail values from the record will be shown below this.

property.name: iconName
property.label: Icon Name
property.description: To display an icon for the details displayed enter the salesforce utlity icon name e.g. utility:weeklyview

property.name: fieldNames
property.label: Field Names
property.description: Enter the API name of the fields seperated by semicolons to display details related to a Study Offerings e.g. reduivy__Start_Date__c;reduivy__End_Date__c;reduivy__Delivery_Method__c

property.name: showFieldLabel
property.label: Show Field Label
property.description: To show the field labels of the details displayed on the header, check the checkbox True.

property.name: showBackgroundBorder
property.label: Show Background Border
property.description: Check true to show card border.

property.name: objectApiName
property.label: Object Name
property.description: Automatically bind the page's object name to the component variable

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: ID of the salesforce record for which the record details are to be displayed e.g. {!recordId}

property.name: title
property.label: Title
property.description: Enter a value to display as Title to define course related information e.g. Registration details, registration detail values from the record will be shown below this.

property.name: iconName
property.label: Icon Name
property.description: To display an icon for the details displayed enter the salesforce utlity icon name e.g. utility:weeklyview

property.name: fieldNames
property.label: Field Names
property.description: Enter the API name of the fields seperated by semicolons to display details related to a Study Offerings e.g. reduivy__Start_Date__c;reduivy__End_Date__c;reduivy__Delivery_Method__c

property.name: showFieldLabel
property.label: Show Field Label
property.description: To show the field labels of the details displayed on the header, check the checkbox True.

property.name: showBackgroundBorder
property.label: Show Background Border
property.description: Check true to show card border.
